generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a grandmother who remembers the draft debates of the 60s, I've always been skeptical about conscription. But with rising tensions and our allies cutting defense budgets, isn't it time we reconsider? A recent poll shows 62% of veterans support selective service reform - including many who served. Our grandchildren deserve the same protection we had. #NationalSecurity #ServiceMatters
